Insights.Text: France won the first half - 5/6 Last Matches

Items.Title: Journalist banned, France delay, FIFA make hydration break decision - World Cup round-up
Items.Description: Day 12 of the FIFA World Cup saw Lionel Messi make history, Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland impress, while France's game against Iraq was delayed
Items.Author: Matty Hewitt

Items.Title: What France & Iraq did during 'mentally draining' two-hour weather delay
Items.Description: France's World Cup match against Iraq was delayed for two hours because of the weather. BBC Sport look at how the sides dealt with it.

Items.Title: France weather storm to beat Iraq and sail into knockouts
Items.Description: Kylian Mbappe marks his 100th international cap for France with two goals in a 3-0 win over Iraq which seals' Les Bleus place in the last 32, after a two-hour storm delay.
